page_content:
AGST333 Crafty Beverage Crops (3 Credits) From soda to wine, a scientiﬁc introduction to "crafty beverage crops". Students will expand their horticulture knowledge and gain an appreciation for craft beverages and the plants that made them. Topics include history, biology, production and management techniques, harvest, storage and market potential for crafty beverage crops. Recommended: PLSC110 or PLSC112; or 1 course in BSCI, BCHM, BIOL.
